name: Xinxiang Richful Lube Additive Co., Ltd
summary: Xinxiang Richful Lube Additive Co., Ltd engages in the development, production, and sale of papermaking chemicals and lubricant additives in China. It offers single agent detergent, dispersant, ZDDP, and high temperature antioxidant series of products. The company also exports its products to the United States, Europe, South America, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and other countries and regions under the Richful brand. Xinxiang Richful Lube Additive Co., Ltd was founded in 1996 and is based in Xinxiang, China.
